title: Fuller VE Shell Decomposition PASS: cuboctahedral shell count 10n^2+2 decomposes across D_1 and sibling diagonals by n mod 3
_fixture_purpose: Proves that Fuller's cuboctahedral / vector-equilibrium shell count S_n = 10n^2 + 2 (n=1: 12, n=2: 42, n=3: 92, n=4: 162, n=5: 252, n=6: 362, n=7: 492, n=8: 642, n=9: 812) sits on the QA b=e diagonal D_1 exactly when n is not divisible by 3, and on an odd-divisor sibling diagonal D_k otherwise. The mod-3 selection is QA-natural (triune residue structure on the canonical Sierpinski diagonal).
source_attribution: Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-13. Shell count formula S_n = 10n^2 + 2 per Buckminster Fuller, Synergetics (1975), cuboctahedral frequency shells. QA diagonal decomposition originated in docs/theory/QA_SIERPINSKI_SELF_SIMILAR_DIAGONAL.md (structural note, 2026-04-13), extending the b=e canonical diagonal ↔ Briddell STF identification documented in qa_fst/qa_fst_addendum_b_equals_e_diagonal.tex.

structural_claim.diagonal_selection_rule: on D_1 (b=e) iff n mod 3 != 0; else on sibling D_k with 2k+1 | S_n
structural_claim.proof_sketch: S_n mod 3 = (n*n + 2) mod 3. n*n mod 3 is 1 when n mod 3 in {1,2} and 0 when n mod 3 == 0. Hence S_n mod 3 == 0 iff n mod 3 != 0, which is the D_1 residence condition.
structural_claim.qa_naturalness: mod-3 selection on D_1 corresponds to the triune residue partition — smallest non-trivial residue-class structure of the canonical Sierpinski diagonal.

witnesses.description: Shell n=1 (cuboctahedral frequency 1, 12 vertices = outer spheres of VE) sits on b=e diagonal
Shell n=3 (92 spheres) does not admit b=e representation; 92 = 4 * 23 = (2*11+1) * 4, sitting on D_11
witnesses.verification: 92 mod 3 = 2 (not on D_1). Odd divisors of 92 are {1, 23}; only non-trivial odd divisor is 23 = 2*11+1. On D_11: e = 11*b with b=4 gives (4, 44, 48, 92).

witnesses.description: Mod-3 partition of first 9 shells: n in {1,2,4,5,7,8} -> D_1 (6 shells); n in {3,6,9} -> sibling diagonals (3 shells). Ratio 2:1 matches QA triune.
witnesses.verification: Residue class {1,2} mod 3 has density 2/3 in N; triune partition is native to D_1 mod-3 structure.

related_certs: [207] circle impossibility (C=0 only as observer projection)
